sanskrit:
दैवी ह्येषा गुणमयी मम माया दुरत्यया।
मामेव ये प्रपद्यन्ते मायामेतां तरन्ति ते॥
transliteration:
daivī hy eṣā guṇa-mayī mama māyā duratyayā |
mām eva ye prapadyante māyām etāṃ taranti te ||
literal_meaning: This divine, three-guna-made illusion of Mine is hard to cross; those who take refuge in Me alone cross over this māyā.
contextual_meaning: The psyche is governed by an automatic, biologically-based matrix (māyā) that is nearly impossible to override by will-power alone; total surrender to an inner transcendent center (Kṛṣṇa) is the only reliable way to dis-identify from the matrix and attain psychological freedom.
psychological_state: Learned-helplessness produced by the ego’s inability to out-think its own conditioning; simultaneous emergence of hope when the possibility of surrender is introduced.
trigger_scenario: A high-functioning professional realizes that sheer discipline cannot break compulsive phone-checking and seeks a 12-step higher-power surrender.
anchor_text: Surrender fully to the inner divine to transcend the mind’s illusion.
